I found your dentist appointment: "Dentist Appointment" — May 18, 2024, 09:00–10:00 at Downtown Dental Clinic (event ID 5).

How would you like to reschedule it? Options — pick one or tell me another:

1) Give an exact new date & time (e.g., "May 20, 2024, 11:00–12:00").  
2) Find the next available morning/afternoon within the next 2 weeks (tell me prefer "morning" or "afternoon").  
3) Move it by a specific amount (e.g., "push 1 week later, same time").

Also confirm these details:
- Keep same duration (1 hour)? (yes/no)
- Keep same location? (yes/no)
- OK to send the reschedule notification now? (rescheduling will email participants)

Tell me which option and any constraints, and I’ll reschedule it.
